title: SilkStrand

designSystem.name: assets/9830d61da42b40f7ac87ff4c46558986
designSystem.summary: Quietly-powerful enterprise control plane. Brand blue #3b82f6, near-white surfaces, cool slate neutrals, Inter + JetBrains Mono, 4px grid, 42px table rows, light-canonical (dark defined but inert).

screens.title: Dashboard (Compliance Overview)
screens.role: first sample (came out mobile; superseded by the desktop Assets screen)

notes: Design system created via stitch-design:manage-design-system from .stitch/DESIGN.md. Stitch derived a fuller MD3 tonal palette around the brand blue; overridePrimaryColor/customColor preserve #3b82f6 and the custom named tokens (success/warning/danger/info, surface-subtle, border-*, body-bg) carried through.
